title: AMD GCN ISA Diff Regression Scaffold

problem.summary: Capture codegen regression evidence by recording LLVM IR / AMD GCN ISA, amdclang++ resource usage, register drift, spills, and instruction mix changes.
outputs: AMD GCN ISA/LLVM IR / AMD GCN ISA dumps
constraints: Template-only; AMD GCN ISA differences are explanatory evidence, not standalone speed claims
Record exact compiler version and arch flags
Keep gfx942 and gfx950 disassembly separate

verification.method: Attach this workflow to a task-specific correctness harness or compile/profile artifact before claiming evidence.

curation.notes: Promoted from the v2 extension backlog as wave 2. No performance, correctness, or profiler evidence is claimed yet.
